faq.question: How can I order the product I am looking for?
faq.answer: You can place an order by contacting us via email at info@universal-az.com.

faq.question: Which brands do you work with?
faq.answer: You can explore our partner brands by visiting the Partners section.

faq.question: Can you find products based on technical specifications?
faq.answer: Yes, we conduct market research to find products that match your technical requirements and present the most suitable options.

faq.question: How long is the price offer valid?
faq.answer: The validity of price offers depends on the project and product. Please contact us for detailed information.

faq.question: Do you offer international supply?
faq.answer: Yes, international supply is available. You can learn more about our global partners in the Partners section.

faq.question: Do you provide urgent order services?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide fast solutions for urgent orders whenever possible. Please send us your request for more details.

faq.question: How can we collaborate with your company?
faq.answer: You can send us your cooperation request, and our team will contact you to discuss possible collaboration opportunities.

faq.question: I want to contact your team directly
faq.answer: Please provide your contact details and request, and we will direct you to the relevant team member.

faq.question: I want to send my CV
faq.answer: You can send your CV to hr@universal-az.com. Our HR team will review it and contact you if there is a suitable position.
